Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class RdfParser

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ReaderParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfParser
All Implemented Interfaces:
RdfMetaProvider, XmlMetaProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
JsonLdParser, N3Parser, NQuadsParser, NTripleParser, RdfJsonParser, RdfXmlParser, TriGParser, TriXParser, TurtleParser
public class RdfParser extends ReaderParser implements RdfMetaProvider
Parses RDF into POJOs.
Behavior-specific subclasses

The following direct subclasses are provided for language-specific parsers:

  • RdfXmlParser - RDF/XML and RDF/XML-ABBREV.
  • NTripleParser - N-TRIPLE.
  • TurtleParser - TURTLE.
  • N3Parser - N3.
Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

    • copy

      public RdfParser.Builder<?> copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

      Overrides:
      copy in class Parser
      Returns:
      A new Builder object.

    • createSession

      public RdfParserSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class ReaderParser
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

      public RdfParserSession getSession()

    • isLooseCollections

      protected final boolean isLooseCollections()
      Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
      Returns:
      true if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
      See Also:
      • RdfParser.Builder.looseCollections()

    • isTrimWhitespace

      protected final boolean isTrimWhitespace()
      Trim whitespace from text elements.
      Returns:
      true if whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.
      See Also:
      • RdfParser.Builder.trimWhitespace()
